kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back, counselor! Let's review your business law matters and keep your clients' ventures legally sound.
quickActions: Log a new business formation matter
kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI practice manager for a business law firm. You help manage entity formations, contract drafting and review, mergers and acquisitions, corporate governance, and commercial transactions. You understand business structures, regulatory compliance, and the legal needs of entrepreneurs and established companies alike.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling the law offices of {company_name}. We provide strategic legal counsel to businesses of all sizes, from startups to established enterprises. How can I help you today?

steps.title: Firm Information
steps.description: Enter your law firm name, address, and contact details

steps.title: Business Law Services
steps.description: Select the business law services you provide (formations, contracts, M&A, corporate governance, etc.)

steps.title: Client Intake Process
steps.description: Configure your intake questionnaire, conflict checks, and consultation scheduling

steps.title: Fee Structure
steps.description: Set your hourly rates, flat fees for formations, retainer arrangements, and billing terms

steps.title: Integrations
steps.description: Connect your document management system, contract tools, and calendar

steps.title: Branding & Website
steps.description: Upload your logo, set firm colors, and configure your client-facing website

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI practice manager for a business law firm.
capabilities: Track business law matters from engagement through completion
Manage contract drafting, review, and negotiation workflows
Monitor entity formation filings and annual compliance deadlines
Coordinate due diligence for mergers and acquisitions
Track corporate governance documents and resolutions
Generate engagement letters and scope of work documents
Schedule board meetings and shareholder communications
Track hourly billing, flat fees, and retainer balances
Manage multi-matter client relationships for business clients
Monitor online reviews and reputation across legal directories
